nodes.label: `opsroom serve` — the console as a local app. Loopback only, zero dependencies.
Reject DNS-rebinding: the Host header must name this loopback server,         ot
Origin/Referer, when a browser sends one, must be this server.
Background source sync so the page is always fresh. In-process, low ceremony.
macOS launchd agent so the console survives reboots. Reversible:     launchctl u
